en: Hello everyone. Here we go.
A: Please stand up! Salute!
B: Hello.
A: Please sit down.

ab: Mihumisang aip, tu hanian masnanava hai namasnava mu tukuna kakanunnan malus Bunun tupa?
ch: 大家好。今天老師要教大家食物的布農語怎麼說。
en: Hello everyone. Today I’m going to teach you how to say Bunun food.

ab: Adu ithal kamu masnanava tu halinga ha?
en: A: Do you understand what the teacher says?

ab: Masnanava, nisaikin ithal, adu mahtuang muhna tupa?
ch: B:老師，我不懂。可以再說一次嗎?
en: B: I don’t understand. Can you repeat it again?

ab: Nisaikin utazan, adu mahtu pidaingun halinga tupa?
ch: B:我聽不到，可以大聲一點嗎?
en: B: I can’t hear you, can you speak louder?

ch: 請看這裡! 跟著我唸一遍。
en: Look here, please! Repeat after me.
It’s very well read.

ab: Muhnang tupa tu musa’n, pimadaingi halinga.
en: Read it again. Please speak louder.
Please be quiet. Don’t talk.
A: Please take out your textbook.
B: Yes, sir.
A: Please take out your pen.
B: I forgot to bring my pen.
A: Please take out the eraser.
B: I forgot to bring my eraser.

ch: A:請跟旁邊同學借橡皮擦。
en: A: Please borrow erasers from your classmates.

ab: Adu mahtuas mapasimul zaku ishahaishais ha?
en: B: Can I borrow your eraser?
Class is over.

ab: Panhaincin ta aip isnavan, napasaduta muhnin tu islunghuan.
ch: 我們就上到這裡，下週再見。
en: Class dismissed, see you next week.
